title: CSV, Excel, and JSON Support in Datilio
summary: Datilio meets files where they are—CSV exports, Excel workbooks, and JSON API dumps.

content.summary: Datilio meets files where they are—CSV exports, Excel workbooks, and JSON API dumps.

body.text: Format flexibility removes re-export friction that kills weekly analysis habits. CSV: watch delimiters and encoding. Excel: single header row, avoid merged cells. JSON: prefer arrays of objects.

body.caption: Calculator and financial data analysis. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: CSV: watch delimiters and encoding. Excel: single header row, avoid merged cells. JSON: prefer arrays of objects.
Preview validates each format before deeper work.

items: Multi-sheet Excel: pick the correct tab at upload.
JSON nesting flattens to dotted column paths.
Consistent naming across formats helps saved rules port.

body.text: Same preview-filter-chart-Talk to Data path regardless of source format.
Teams standardize on habits, not on forcing one export type.
Datilio format support keeps file-first real for mixed tool environments.
